name: SalesRabbit Field Sales & Canvassing API
what_it_does: SalesRabbit REST API for field sales and door-to-door canvassing management platform. Enables AI agents to manage sales territory and lead assignment workflows, handle field rep GPS tracking and check-in data, access prospect and customer data from canvassing activities, retrieve sales performance and pipeline analytics, manage digital contracts and document signing, handle lead scoring and disposition tracking, access mapping and geofencing data for territory management, retrieve conversion and appointment setting data, and integrate field sales data with CRM and home services platforms.
use_cases: Managing field rep territory and lead assignments from sales operations automation agents
Tracking canvassing activity and GPS check-ins from field sales monitoring agents
Retrieving prospect pipeline and conversion analytics from sales intelligence agents
Integrating canvassing leads with CRM from solar and home services agents
not_for: Inside sales without field canvassing and territory management needs
B2B enterprise sales without door-to-door and residential customer focus
Retail without field sales team and territory assignment requirements
best_when: A solar company, home security provider, pest control, or home services company using SalesRabbit wants AI agents to automate territory management, field rep tracking, lead assignment, canvassing analytics, and CRM integration.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Field GPS tracking of sales reps raises employee privacy concerns. Door-to-door canvassing must comply with local solicitation ordinances and Do Not Knock registries. Automated prospect data collection requires TCPA and state privacy compliance. Customer signature data from digital contracts is sensitive.

auth.notes: SalesRabbit uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Account-level credentials. Developer portal with API documentation. Webhooks for lead and sales activity events. Integrations with Salesforce, HubSpot, and home services CRMs.

pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-rep pricing; Team and Enterprise plans
pricing.notes: Lehi, Utah. Founded 2012. Leading field sales platform for door-to-door and canvassing. Used by 75,000+ field reps. Strong solar, home security, and pest control verticals. Deep partnerships with SunPower, Vivint, and major solar companies. Competes with Spotio and D2D Experts for field sales.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: GPS tracking of field reps requires employee notice and consent
Door-to-door solicitation must comply with local ordinances and Do Not Knock registries
No public MCP server — API key and OAuth2 REST API with developer portal
TCPA compliance required for automated follow-up communications with canvassing prospects
Digital contract signing creates legal documents — require human review before automated processing
Territory data is competitive business intelligence — restrict API access appropriately
agent_readiness.security_notes: Field rep GPS and prospect data. SOC2. API key and OAuth2. US data residency. TCPA and solicitation compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Field sales GPS and prospect data. SOC2. API key. US data residency. Employee privacy and TCPA compliance.
